meaning: n.绂忛煶浼犻亾,绂忛煶涓讳箟,绂忛煶浼犻亾鑰呯殑宸ヤ綔
examples: But his densely written technical evangelism is not easy to get to grips with.
In Guatemala, which has a far higher proportion of indigenous people than Mexico, evangelism is doing even better.
Leadership, evangelism, empathy and faith were at the top of the list--just what you'd expect in a church sermon.
